== Notes for [[Item:Q100777|Q100777]] ==

The family surname is De Saporta (or variant thereof); over time the first name of Benveniste has been applied as the surname of part of the lineage, see: https://www.academia.edu/7867357/El_testamento_de_Benvenist_de_Saporta_1268_

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD822A1F1EFBBFA9822EF79916CD510
geni:6000000112947969083

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
